title: Soldier's Fandango
description:
Yeah, more tf2, sue me. It's the only source I have fun making ytpmvs of. Still, no spy bleep, no engie guitar, no soldier scream, because you guys are always bitching about that.

Oh and I might stick to gmod once I get good ideas. I'm losing the fun in making ytpmvs, and this was inspired by Wazgul's recent ytpmvs.
